additionalquery: SELECT indskr_customercallplanid FROM indskr_customercallplan icp INNER JOIN contact c ON c.contactid = icp.indskr_customerid WHERE c.indskr_externalid NOT LIKE 'MDM%'

<fetch><entity name='appointment'><attribute name='appointmentid'/><filter type='and'><condition attribute='subject' operator='like' value='%Test%'/><condition attribute='statecode' operator='eq' value='1'/></filter></entity></fetch>
